subtasks.title: Initialize project
subtasks.description: Create a new npm project, initialize a git repo, and add basic project structure (src/, public/, package.json).
subtasks.successCriteria: A git repository and package.json exist in the project root and directories src/ and public/ are present.

subtasks.title: Install dependencies
subtasks.description: Install Express and developer/build tools: tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, and nodemon (dev).
subtasks.successCriteria: npm install completes without errors and package.json lists express, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, and nodemon as dependencies/devDependencies.

subtasks.title: Configure Tailwind and build scripts
subtasks.description: Create tailwind.config.js and postcss.config.js, add Tailwind input CSS and npm scripts to build/watch CSS output into public/styles.css.
subtasks.successCriteria: tailwind.config.js and postcss.config.js exist and an npm script (e.g., build:css) produces public/styles.css with Tailwind output.

subtasks.title: Create Express server to serve static frontend
subtasks.description: Implement server.js (or src/server.js) that serves files from public/ and exposes an /api route namespace for optional settings.
subtasks.successCriteria: node server.js starts without errors and navigating to http://localhost:3000 serves public/index.html; /api/* returns 200 for defined endpoints.

subtasks.title: Add Tailwind input CSS and build assets
subtasks.description: Create a CSS input file with @tailwind directives, run the build script to generate the final CSS into public/styles.css, and confirm the file is served.
subtasks.successCriteria: public/styles.css exists, contains Tailwind utility classes, and is successfully loaded by the served HTML page.

subtasks.title: Create frontend UI to modify text and colors
subtasks.description: Implement public/index.html and a small public/app.js using Tailwind for styling; include controls (text input, color pickers) that update the displayed "hello world" text and its colors in real time.
subtasks.successCriteria: The page displays the default 'hello world' text and controls; changing inputs updates the text content and color/ background immediately in the browser.

subtasks.title: Optional API for defaults and saving
subtasks.description: Add simple in-memory GET /api/settings and POST /api/settings endpoints to serve and accept default text/color values (no DB required).
subtasks.successCriteria: GET /api/settings returns JSON with defaults and POST /api/settings accepts JSON and returns the saved object (in-memory), verified via curl or browser.

subtasks.title: Test app and write usage documentation
subtasks.description: Start the server, manually test UI interactions and API endpoints, fix issues, and add a README describing how to run, build CSS, and modify the hello world colors via the UI.
subtasks.successCriteria: README contains start/build instructions and screenshots or steps; manual tests confirm the UI updates text and colors and API endpoints behave as documented.

decompositionStrategy: Top-down decomposition: initialize project environment, install and configure required tooling (Express + Tailwind), implement server and build pipeline, create frontend UI that exposes controls for modifying the displayed text and its colors, optionally add a simple API for defaults/persistence, then test and document the app.
